seoTitle: Warrentinna vs Waterhouse — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Warrentinna and Waterhouse. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Warrentinna and Waterhouse.
heading: Warrentinna vs Waterhouse — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Warrentinna, Tasmania and Waterhouse, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Waterhouse has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Warrentinna (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Warrentinna or Waterhouse safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Warrentinna has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Waterhouse scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Warrentinna scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Waterhouse scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Warrentinna or Waterhouse?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Waterhouse has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.67% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
